findings.evidence: PR lines 83-114 impose `[HopfAlgebra k A]`; Mathlib `TensorProduct.instCoalgebraStruct`, `TensorProduct.comul_tmul`, and `TensorProduct.counit_tmul` are coalgebra-struct-level at `mathlib/Mathlib/RingTheory/Coalgebra/TensorProduct.lean:42-70`, while the full tensor-product coalgebra instance only needs `[Coalgebra S A] [Coalgebra R B]` at lines 74 and 131.
findings.fix: Split the section: state the counit/comultiplication lemmas under a coalgebra-level assumption such as `[Coalgebra k A]` (or `CoalgebraStruct` for the two `*_tmul` lemmas if convenient), and keep `[HopfAlgebra k A]` only for the antipode lemmas.
findings.issue: `counit_tmul`, `counit_includeRight`, `comul_tmul`, and `comul_includeRight` are in a section with `[HopfAlgebra k A]`, although they only use the tensor-product coalgebra structure and not the antipode or bialgebra axioms on `A`.

summary: The main base-change type, inclusion, and bialgebra-map API are now at the right algebra/bialgebra level, but the operation section still puts coalgebra-only lemmas behind a Hopf assumption.
